creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
For some reason, I didn't see Stefan's email in my mailbox, so I never knew 
there was a problem.  I thought I had checked the pkg-plist before submitting 
but apparently not.  That is the only other thing that needs patching, and I'm 
attaching the patch to this email.  The rest of the patch in the original PR 
should still be valid (although this was done before MD5 was removed from the 
ports tree, so that should be taken into account as well).

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
